_comment: qa_activate_power.json — QA: p1 piece at (4,5) holds ['jump_proof'] in powers. Inputs: (1) click (4,5) to select, (2) activate 'jump_proof' (self power, no target). Expected: piece.is_jump_proof==true, piece.powers no longer contains 'jump_proof' (consumed), current_player unchanged (blocking power ends turn — actually jump_proof is non-blocking so turn does NOT flip; current_player stays 1).
